item.title: Unfixed Beauty: Why the Delay?
item.description: A stunning vehicle or project remains unfinished. Explore the reasons for the delay, challenges faced, and what it takes to bring it back to perfection.

media:content.media:title: Unfixed Beauty: Why the Delay?
media:content.media:description: A stunning vehicle or project remains unfinished. Explore the reasons for the delay, challenges faced, and what it takes to bring it back to perfection.

item.title: Is This Really the End for This Porsche Macan?
item.description: A Porsche Macan faces major issues that may signal its end. Explore the problems, repair possibilities, and whether this luxury SUV can be saved.

media:content.media:title: Is This Really the End for This Porsche Macan?
media:content.media:description: A Porsche Macan faces major issues that may signal its end. Explore the problems, repair possibilities, and whether this luxury SUV can be saved.

item.title: The Bronco Is Back for an Oil Change
item.description: A Ford Bronco returns to the shop for routine maintenance. See the oil change process, tips for care, and keeping this classic SUV running smoothly.

media:content.media:title: The Bronco Is Back for an Oil Change
media:content.media:description: A Ford Bronco returns to the shop for routine maintenance. See the oil change process, tips for care, and keeping this classic SUV running smoothly.

item.title: My ’94 Viper Is Changing for Good!
item.description: A 1994 Dodge Viper undergoes major updates and transformations. See the upgrades, restoration process, and how this iconic sports car is evolving.

media:content.media:title: My ’94 Viper Is Changing for Good!
media:content.media:description: A 1994 Dodge Viper undergoes major updates and transformations. See the upgrades, restoration process, and how this iconic sports car is evolving.

item.title: 6 Used Cars to Avoid – Mechanic’s Advice
item.description: A 20+ year mechanic shares six used cars to be cautious of. Learn common issues, red flags, and tips to avoid costly mistakes when buying a used vehicle.

media:content.media:title: 6 Used Cars to Avoid – Mechanic’s Advice
media:content.media:description: A 20+ year mechanic shares six used cars to be cautious of. Learn common issues, red flags, and tips to avoid costly mistakes when buying a used vehicle.

item.title: $12,000 Repair on This Bronco
item.description: A massive $12,000 repair on a Ford Bronco. See what went wrong, the work required, and how this costly fix was tackled.

media:content.media:description: A massive $12,000 repair on a Ford Bronco. See what went wrong, the work required, and how this costly fix was tackled.

item.title: It’s So Expensive to Fix Everything
item.description: Tackling multiple vehicle repairs that come with a hefty price tag. See the challenges, costs, and decision-making involved in fixing everything at once.

media:content.media:title: It’s So Expensive to Fix Everything
media:content.media:description: Tackling multiple vehicle repairs that come with a hefty price tag. See the challenges, costs, and decision-making involved in fixing everything at once.

item.title: Who Modifies a Smart Car Like This?
item.description: A heavily modified Smart Car takes customization to the next level. See the unique upgrades, performance tweaks, and why someone would transform a tiny car this way.

media:content.media:description: A heavily modified Smart Car takes customization to the next level. See the unique upgrades, performance tweaks, and why someone would transform a tiny car this way.

item.title: I’ve Worked Long Enough on These Cars!
item.description: After extensive repairs and maintenance, it’s time to step back. See the challenges faced, lessons learned, and why some car projects test patience and skill.

item.title: AFM: Engine Saver or Engine Killer?
item.description: Examining Active Fuel Management (AFM) systems. Discover whether AFM protects engines or causes damage, with insights and real-world experiences.

item.description: Reacting to a situation that went completely wrong. See what happened, the challenges faced, and why it turned out so badly.

item.title: Would You Fix It?
item.description: Facing a repair challenge and asking the big question: is it worth fixing? See the issue, the potential solutions, and the decision-making process.
